subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Direct production rollout bypasses mandatory 48-hour staging validation (POL-601) and lacks change board approval (POL-602). Rollback and traffic monitoring posture (POL-603) is unverified.
applied_constraints: Require 48-hour staging validation prior to production rollout
Obtain change board approval and configure post-deployment monitoring
Confirm automated rollback and traffic monitoring are in place before proceeding
